节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Options of the cache download task.
HTTP headers added to the cache download request.

Downloads resources at the specified URL. Resources will be stored in memory cache or files cache. The maximum size of the specified URL is 8192 bytes. The maximum size of a single resource after decompression is 20,971,520 bytes(20 MB). If the decompressed size of the downloaded resource exceeds the limit, it will not be recorded in the cache.
2. Incorrect parameter type. 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string } url - URL of the cache download target.
@param { CacheDownloadOptions } options - Options of the cache download task.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Missing mandatory parameters.

parameters.说明: URL of the cache download target.
Options of the cache download task.

error_codes.description: parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Missing mandatory parameters.

节点.功能描述:
Cancels an ongoing cache download task based on the target URL. The maximum size of the specified URL is 8192 bytes.
2. Incorrect parameter type. 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string } url - URL of the cache download target.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Missing mandatory parameters.

parameters.说明: URL of the cache download target.

error_codes.description: parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Missing mandatory parameters.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the size of the memory cache used to store downloaded content. The default size is 0 bytes. The maximum size is 1,073,741,824 bytes(1 GB).
2. Incorrect parameter type. 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number } bytes - The maximum amount of data cached in memory, in bytes.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Missing mandatory parameters.

parameters.说明: The maximum amount of data cached in memory, in bytes.

error_codes.description: parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Missing mandatory parameters.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the size of the file cache used to store downloaded content. The default size is 104,857,600 bytes(100 MB). The maximum size is 4,294,967,296 bytes(4 GB).
2. Incorrect parameter type. 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number } bytes - The maximum amount of data cached in files, in bytes.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Missing mandatory parameters.

parameters.说明: The maximum amount of data cached in files, in bytes.

error_codes.description: parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Missing mandatory parameters.
